stemHtml: The autothrust is NOT used in severe turbulence. Why is that?

options.a: The aircraft may exceed its never exceed speed due to autothrust inputs.
options.b: The engine may exceed its limitations due to autothrust inputs.
options.c: The autothrust may overcompensate in an oscillating manner.
options.d: The aircraft may stall due to too low autothrust inputs.
